inflection: 动词变化: disagrees / disagreed / disagreeing

example_sentence_en: She accepted my advice yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 她昨天接受了我的建议。
inflection: 动词变化: accepts / accepted / accepting

example_sentence_en: He refused my help yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天拒绝了我的帮助。
inflection: 动词变化: refuses / refused / refusing

example_sentence_en: They rejected the proposal last week.
example_sentence_cn: 他们上周驳回了那个提议。
inflection: 动词变化: rejects / rejected / rejecting

example_sentence_en: That was the wisest choice.
example_sentence_cn: 那是最明智的选择。
inflection: 比较级: wiser | 最高级: wisest

example_sentence_en: He gave the correct answer yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天给出了正确的答案。
inflection: 比较级: more correct | 最高级: most correct

example_sentence_en: He realized he was wrong yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天意识到他错了。
inflection: 比较级: wronger | 最高级: wrongest

example_sentence_en: Your advice was the most helpful.
example_sentence_cn: 你的建议是最有帮助的。
inflection: 比较级: more helpful | 最高级: most helpful

example_sentence_en: This is the most useful tool I have.
example_sentence_cn: 这是我拥有的最有用的工具。
inflection: 比较级: more useful | 最高级: most useful

example_sentence_en: He found the proper way to solve it yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天找到了解决它的合适方法。
inflection: 比较级: more proper | 最高级: most proper

example_sentence_en: Is this the most suitable time?
example_sentence_cn: 这是最适宜的时间吗？
inflection: 比较级: more suitable | 最高级: most suitable

example_sentence_en: Sleep is the most necessary thing for health.
example_sentence_cn: 睡眠是对健康最必要的事情。
inflection: 比较级: more necessary | 最高级: most necessary

example_sentence_en: Health is the most important thing.
example_sentence_cn: 健康是最重要的事情。
inflection: 比较级: more important | 最高级: most important

example_sentence_en: Water is vital for our bodies.
example_sentence_cn: 水对我们的身体至关重要。
inflection: 比较级: more vital | 最高级: most vital

example_sentence_en: He is the most careful student in our class.
example_sentence_cn: 他是我们班最细心的学生。
inflection: 比较级: more careful | 最高级: most careful

example_sentence_en: He exercised caution yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天表现得很谨慎。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: The doctor warned him last week.
example_sentence_cn: 医生上周警告过他。
inflection: 动词变化: warns / warned / warning

example_sentence_en: She reminded me of the meeting yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 她昨天提醒我开会的事。
inflection: 动词变化: reminds / reminded / reminding

example_sentence_en: I persuaded him to see a doctor yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 我昨天说服他去看医生了。
inflection: 动词变化: persuades / persuaded / persuading

example_sentence_en: He convinced me yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天让我信服了。
inflection: 动词变化: convinces / convinced / convincing

example_sentence_en: His words influenced me greatly yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他的话昨天极大地影响了我。
inflection: 动词变化: influences / influenced / influencing

example_sentence_en: He guided me to make the best decision yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天指导我做出了最好的决定。
inflection: 动词变化: guides / guided / guiding; 复数: guides

example_sentence_en: She instructed us clearly yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 她昨天清楚地指示了我们。
inflection: 动词变化: instructs / instructed / instructing

example_sentence_en: We evaluated the plan carefully yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 我们昨天仔细评估了这项计划。
inflection: 动词变化: evaluates / evaluated / evaluating

example_sentence_en: The doctor assessed his health yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 医生昨天评定他的健康状况。
inflection: 动词变化: assesses / assessed / assessing

example_sentence_en: Don't judge a person by his appearance.
example_sentence_cn: 不要以貌取人。
inflection: 动词变化: judges / judged / judging

example_sentence_en: He made a useful comment yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 他昨天做了一条有用的评论。
inflection: 动词变化: comments / commented / commenting; 复数: comments

example_sentence_en: The teacher criticized him yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 老师昨天批评了他。
inflection: 动词变化: criticizes / criticized / criticizing

example_sentence_en: The teacher praised him for his hard work yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 老师昨天表扬了他的努力。
inflection: 动词变化: praises / praised / praising

example_sentence_en: My parents approved my plan yesterday.
example_sentence_cn: 我父母昨天赞成我的计划。
inflection: 动词变化: approves / approved / approving

example_sentence_en: They supported my idea last time.
example_sentence_cn: 他们上次支持了我的想法。
inflection: 动词变化: supports / supported / supporting
